brand.name: Lumen Hospital
brand.tagline: Modern hospital care, on your time.

home.lede: We are a small Mongolian hospital that takes time with every patient. Book your visit online and skip the queue.
home.services_lede: Family care, specialty diagnostics, and same-week appointments — under one roof.

trust_items.title: We listen first
trust_items.body: We won't rush to a verdict. Tell us what's going on; the diagnosis comes second.

trust_items.title: Honest pricing
trust_items.body: Transparent fees. No surprise charges or hidden line items.

trust_items.title: Modern diagnostics
trust_items.body: International-standard equipment and an in-house lab.

cta_band.title: Book tomorrow's visit, today.
cta_band.body: 30 seconds. No phone tag. No email required.

about.title: Care that treats you as a person, not a chart.
about.lede: Lumen Hospital opened in 2009. From day one we have insisted on a simple idea: every patient is a person before they are a case.
about.mission_body: To deliver calm, attentive, world-class care to anyone who walks through our doors — without the cold corridor feeling.

values.title: One person at a time
values.body: We will not interrupt you mid-sentence. The conversation finishes before the chart opens.

values.title: Evidence-led
values.body: We read journals weekly. Treatment follows the data, not the year you trained.

values.title: Follow-up included
values.body: We check in after the visit. You are not on your own once the door closes.

services.title: Services
services.lede: Pick a service area below and book a time directly with the right doctor.

contact.title: Contact
contact.lede: Questions, ideas, or feedback — drop us a line.
contact.address: Bayanzurkh Tower, Floor 4, Sukhbaatar District, Khoroo 1, Ulaanbaatar, Mongolia

booking.step_dept_lede: Which kind of care are you looking for?
booking.step_doctor_lede: We will show their open times next.
booking.step_slot_lede: All times are Ulaanbaatar local time. Once you pick, we go to the confirmation step.
booking.step_form_lede: Just two fields — so we can reach you if anything changes.
booking.field_notes_ph: e.g. headaches for the past 3 days
booking.no_slots: No openings this week. Try next week.
booking.success_lede: We'll call the number below if anything changes. Please screenshot this page.

errors.slot_already_booked: Sorry — that slot was just taken by someone else. Please pick another.
errors.patient_phone_invalid: Phone must be +976 followed by 8 digits.
errors.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.
